message: 有结果了：新的 querybank-normalized child line 已经用手动兜底方案真正落成，而且已经有独立提交，不再依赖那个会误判 anchor 的 `submit_idea` 路径。这条新线把上一层泛泛的 hubness 修正收紧成了一个更具体、也更容易直接实验的选择：先在同一个 16-frame teacher-anchor packet surface 上做 Querybank Normalisation / Dynamic Inverted Softmax，并把 CSLS 保留成强控制；如果这一步仍然压不住 `0009/0010/0011` 这几个 hub，再升级到 dual-bank normalization 或回到 query-side geometry repair。接下来最合理的下一步已经很明确了：直接从这条新 child line 进入 experiment，做一轮 bounded smoke，把 raw global-bank、QB-Norm/DIS 和 CSLS 三者放到同一个对比面上。

guidance_vm.summary: Milestone recorded. Continue from the current anchor and keep the next checkpoint durable.
guidance_vm.why_now: Milestones should mark meaningful progress, not end the route prematurely.
complete_when: The next substantive output is written durably.

suggested_artifact_calls.name: artifact.interact(kind='progress', ...)
suggested_artifact_calls.purpose: Send the next checkpoint update across active surfaces.
